info.title: Aisle Commerce Gateway API
info.description: Gateway-level API contract for platform auth, tenant operations, storefront flows, and billing subscriptions.

storeSubdomain.description: Local store subdomain used for tenant-aware storefront requests.

get.description: Use this before state-changing browser API requests that rely on cookies, then send the returned token in `X-CSRF-Token` or `_csrf`.
